entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v6.0.2
entry.content: # Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - Fixed the Soul Type functions using integers instead of True and False, causing the Option to not work as intended.

entry.title: Manual_SkylandersGiants_ThisGuyHere v1.1.1
entry.content: * support for Stable - 20260319 * fixed an issue with a debug message causing errors

entry.title: Hunie Pop v2.3.0
entry.content:
- (APWorld/Client/PopTracker) Added option/logic for having progressive dates - (APWorld) Fixed issue with custom options when set to min or max value - (APWorld) Fixed Universal Tracker compatibility - (APWorld) Changed Default option order and fixed some typos

CLIENT INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Hunie Pop Installed - Download Hunie Pop Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Hunie Pop Archipelago plugin.zip" to the directory where "HuniePop.exe" is if it asks you to overwrite files click yes - NOTE if you get a game crash when starting the game make sure that in "{huniepop game directory}/BepInEx/config/BepInEx.cfg" the 2nd last option is "type = MonoBehaviour" not "type = Application" APWORLD INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Huniepop APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Huniepop APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recomended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default Huniepop YMAL POPTRACKER INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - copy "Hunie Pop Archipelago poptracker.zip" to your poptracker "packs" folder

entry.title: Supraland v0.1.0
entry.content: Removed support for Blue ville theft. Bump required AP to 0.6.7

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.10.0.post2
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.10.0 This update is NOT compatible with worlds generated on previous versions!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md). Development on the Itch.io version of Casualties: Unknown has stopped. To play this mod on the Itch.io version, use CUAP v0.8.0.
## Additions - Update to Casualties: Unknown V7.0.1 - EnergyLink and RingLink support [APWorld Change] - You can sell items to traders and deposit the trade value into either EnergyLink or RingLink currency - You can also withdrawl from either currency pool to buy something from a trader - SleepLink support [APWorld Change] - Originally a joke from the Stardew Valley thread, this is the first game to actually impliment this dumb idea - Yes, it is exactly what it sounds like - The AED and Manual Defibrilator minigames now have items when Randomize Minigames is set to Individual ## Changes - The Goal Depth must now be over 1500m for the five extra padding Depth Extenders to be added to the itempool [APWorld Change] - The default amount of Archipelago Items in the template YAML is now 40 [APWorld Change] - Archipelago Items now have logical requirements when Randomize Minigames is on [APWorld Change] - The first 20% or 15 Archipelago Items are free, whichever is higher - The next 40% of Archipelago Items require EITHER Lockpicking or Keypad Minigames - The last 40% requires BOTH Lockpicking or Keypad Minigames - If Randomize Minigames is set to As One, the last 80% is locked behind the Minigames item - These changes are purely logical to help getting these minigames sooner in seeds, nothing stops you from going out of logic in-game ## Fixes - Having Deathlink set to limbdamage no longer causes a lang error when getting Deathlinked - Fixed Starting Inventory from Pool doing nothing (#45) [APWorld Change] - Fixed unique Layer Unlocks still existing when the goal is Escape Overgrown Depths [APWorld Change] ## Known Issues - A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with how Harmony interacts with Prefix patches on IEnumerators - If more than one Archipelago Item exists, they will all share the same sprite and description. This is a limitation of the original game, and will not be fixed - Craftsanity checks will still be sent if crafting fails due to low INT. This is a bug in the original game, and will not be fixed - The "Saline Bottle Recipe" item unlocks the Saline liquid recipe, not the container recipe

entry.title: Paper Mario v0.6.6
entry.content:
## Bugfixes/Corrections
* Fixed packaging mistake of the apworld file, leading to errors during seed generation.
## Other
* Updated the `Ressources and FAQ` docs * Swap links to point to the new Github repository * Update the tracker list * Updated the setup docs * Mention bizhawk 2.11 or newer as possible emulator version * Add setup guide for Luna's Project64

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.1.post2
entry.content:
Bugfixes Added in-game notifications for item's received. No more Skarbrand riding horses.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.10.0...v0.10.1

entry.title: Manual_FantasyLife_JBtheShadow v1.0.1
Final Fantasy X v0.8.1
entry.content:
## FFX Apworld v0.8.1
### Bug Fix - Nemesis rules were being overwritten several times, causing inconsistencies in it's logic. These rules have now been collected together and set properly. (@Rurusachi)

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.0+pre.release.3
entry.content: I hope that's the last pre-release before release !

entry.title: YARG v0.0.18
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
New: - Support for the Whiteweek 01 Setlist
## What's Changed * Added Whiteweek 01 by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/39
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.17...0.0.18

entry.title: Tevi v0.7.2
entry.content:
## Change Log
### Logic + Travoll mines region updated + Thanatara Canyon - Money Room X: 2 Y: 6 -> Slide only if you have Dagger + Mines - Money Room X: 8 Y: 8 -> fixed + Ulvosa - Money Room X: 12 Y: 12 -> missing slide + Verdazure Ocean - Money Room X: 14 Y: 13 -> reachable going through the boss + tornado spin + DreamKeeper - Money Room X: 20 Y: 6 -> Knife can reach this without slide + Verdazure Ocean - Money Room X: 19 Y: 16 -> reverse path + Verdazure Swamp - Bulletproof Pillar S -> removed Vortex blocks + Catacombs -> access rule to the boss area changed
### Other + Other Players traps are shown as own progression items + save random generated trap icons + option open morose and blocking blocks are removed

entry.title: Ori and the Will of the Wisps v0.5.5
entry.content: Fix the connection to the AP server crashing when the `qol` option is False and `quests` is `none`.

entry.title: Age Of Empires II: Definitive Edition v0.0.1
entry.content:
## What's Changed
### New Campaign: Joan of Arc - All 6 scenarios from the original base game.
### New Setting: Shuffle Buildings - When enabled, buildings are shuffled into the pool. When disabled, buildings are given to the player as starting items. - Buildings take into account what civilizations are being played. Attila the Hun will never expect the player to need houses, and Joan of Arc won't ask for Feitorias. - 6 different options for shuffling: 1. _Shuffle Economy:_ Economy buildings are shuffled and must be unlocked, such as TC, houses, market, and dropsites. Will shuffle docks. 2. _Shuffle Tech:_ Tech buildings such as blacksmith, university, and monastery are shuffled. 3. _Shuffle Military:_ Military buildings are shuffled, including dock and Castle 4. _Shuffle Defense:_ Walls, towers, and castle are shuffled. Includes outpost. 5. _Shuffle Unique:_ In the future, unique buildings will be shuffled, currently doesn't do anything except keep unique buildings out of your starting inventory. 6. _Shuffle Wonder:_ The wonder the wonder the... no!
### New Feature: APavilion - Each scenario now has a pavilion that allows them to declare victory once they beat a campaign. This will allow the player to obtain more checks even after winning a scenario. - The pavilion will flash AP colors when the player has won the scenario and will have a tech called "Victory". - Upon subsequent visits to a completed scenario, the player may declare victory at any point. - In the future, mercenaries and one-time resources will be located here for the player's digression.
### Logic Overhaul - Starting resources are now dynamically generated to fill space. Players can now expect to have at least 1000 of gold, food, and wood and 500 stone by completion of the apworld. If the item pool is too small for that amount of items, players will receive less starting resources. - Building locations require the player to be able to reach their age and have villagers. Dynamically adjusts to unlocked scenarios. - All Attila the Hun locations have much stricter logic (makes things easier). - All opponents require a building with a counter to the units they build. Much thanks to @Stefrex1 for researching unit compositions for every scenario.
### Updated Setting: Enabled Campaigns - Now accepts Joan of Arc as an option. When selecting multiple Campaigns, all campaigns must be finished to goal.
### Updated Setting: Starting Campaigns - Now accepts Joan of Arc as an option. Each selected campaign will be given as a starting item.
### Updated Setting: Scenario Branching - Scenario Branching All: affects Joan of Arc scenarios 2 and 3. In both campaigns, each individual castle is a check. - Scenario Branching Any: Destroying any castle in Joan of Arc 2 gives a single check. Destroy any three castles in Joan of Arc 3 for one check each.
### QOL - Scenario-Specific checks are now listed as objectives in each scenario. At the moment, there is no difference between Branching Any and Branching All for which checks are displayed.
### Client Changes - The client will now only connects to the game when it is connected to the AP world server. - The player is now notified when the game is connected to the client.
### Bugfixes - World now actually goals 11 - Scenario items no longer bleed into other scenarios. - Scenarios now wait for a connection before attempting to load startup data. - Removed starting resources from existing scenarios. - Failed reads and writes no longer display "Wrong AP World Version" errors.
### Known Issues - In Joan of Arc 2, if one of the English players is defeated, the other surrenders as in vanilla, deleting their castles and giving free checks.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dmwever/Ageipelago/compare/0.1.4...0.2.0

entry.title: Age Of Empires II: Definitive Edition v0.0.1
entry.content:
## What's Changed
### AP World Only - Compatible with 0.2.0 AP worlds
### Bugfixes - AP Client now checks all campaigns instead of quitting if the first one is not active.

entry.title: Refunct v1.2.2
entry.content:
### v1.2.1 -> v1.2.2 Gameplay - You can now use the normal jump key to dash while in the air in the mountain minigames. (thanks @nepcore !) - If you press jump again after the dash, you'll do a downward dash. Movement feels cool to me?
Fixes & features - Fixed item & location count not adding up - Fixed Universal Tracker problems - Added yamlless Universal Tracker support (I think...)
Yaml - Changed **default yaml**: all minigames are possible to appear now with different weights, 7 will be chosen at random.
Removed stuff D: - I removed the "Just Clique" option which would turn the entire game into just 2 locations, seemed like a fun meme but I'm too scared it might give (progression balancing) generating problems and people might not expect/want this in their multiworld.
### v1.2.0 -> v1.2.1 - Made flowers filler again (whoops)
# Version 1.1.x->1.2.0 - Memes and Fixes! Don't believe what the title says, there are no memes whatsoever. ## Additions - Funny Bridge Game Minigame: inspired by Squid Game, can you pick the correct tiles and survive the RNG bridge? The prize: 1 check! - Clique Minigame: you know Clique? An Archipelago game all about pressing a button! There is one free item on the ~~desk~~ platform, and then another item for pressing the button. But the button activation item needs to be found first! - Just Clique: tired of Refunct? Enable this option and the *entire* game will *just* be Clique! - Two "testing" levels are added: one "frogger" and one "beat block". You can find them when you are connected to any Refunct game. Check them out if you have time and let me know what you think and if you have ideas :3 ## Fixes - Deathlinks are only sent when the last one was at least 3 seconds ago. - Flowers that are forced into minigames are now correctly replaced by traps or english/latin names. - Incremented max number of minigames to 14.
Readme: https://github.com/spinerak/refunct-tas-archipelago/blob/master/README.md

entry.title: Mega Man Zero 3 v0.2.6
entry.content:
Just some bug fixes for this update.
# Bug Fixes - Fixed issue regarding lost body and foot chips. - Fixed issue where subtanks wouldn't be given properly if randomized weapons was not enabled. - Added generation logic for location checks requiring the flame body chip and recoil rod.

entry.title: Mario Kart Wii v0.2.2
entry.content:
## Release Version 0.2.2: Empty Start Items Fix Discovered an issue where the client would fall back on a default itemset, because that scenario was not properly handled. It is fixed now, thats basically the only thing that changed.
### Changelog: - Fixed empty start items issue - Fixed an issue where the starting cups would display incorrectly in UT (It might still show up wrong, but I have confirmed this is only on UT, the actual generation logic is correct and the AP is completable).
**REQUIRES APWORLD VERSION 0.2.0 - 0.2.2 (below 0.2.2 should still work, it will just show up wrong in UT)**
_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.2.1...v0.2.2

entry.title: Shadow The Hedgehog v0.4.6
entry.content:
Fix release files for previous version. Disable active debugging code correctly.
==Please note all the below are a WIP, if you wish to contribute to improve== Level Guide: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1AhW4_tbdYi1otHE17zuGV4dDjaR6xaNDB6nT8rVNY0o/edit?usp=sharing
Setup Guide: https://github.com/choatix/Archipelago/blob/shadow-cp/worlds/shadow_the_hedgehog/docs/setup_en.md
Readme: https://github.com/choatix/Archipelago/blob/shadow-cp/worlds/shadow_the_hedgehog/docs/en_Shadow%20The%20Hedgehog.md
Archipelago Wiki: https://archipelago.miraheze.org/wiki/Shadow_the_Hedgehog
_Changes since last big release (0.2.7)_ **Item Box Sanity** Capsules, boxes containing capsules are added as optional sanity.
**Checkpoint Shuffle** Random starting checkpoint for levels and unlockable checkpoints as items in game.
**Checkpoint Convenience** Option available to be able to go back to any previous activated checkpoint when playing with checkpoint sanity on.
**Improved Logic Handling** Reworked logic for all enemies, items, weapons, etc to improve seeds.
**Key Shuffle** Options related to key items and key doors allowing for more varied routes through stages.
**Last Way Early** Previous Last Way was only included in story shuffle with the option, but now available by selecting Last Story even when playing select, preventing Devil Doom.
**Select Gates** Gates added so stage accessibility is not locked to single stage unlocks.
**Traps** Small assortment of traps added - Checkpoint, Ammo and Poison.

entry.title: Plants vs. Zombies: Replanted v1.8.0
entry.content:
- Adds a **Wavesanity** option, allowing you to decide exactly how many extra waves should have locations, ranging from 0 all the way up to 2272. (Think about other players before enabling too many!) - You can now **randomise the zombies present on "The Great Wall"**. If the zombies chosen have Chinese variants, they will be used - otherwise they will keep their default appearance. - You can now set the **appearance rate of different costumes**. This includes the winter variants of Peashooter, Wall-nut, Zombie and Conehead; the Chinese variants of Flower Pot and various zombies; the retro variants of Peashooter and Zombie; the Plants vs. Zombies 2 variant of Cabbage-pult; the Headcrab variant of Conehead and the original variant of Backup Dancer. This affects **all levels**! - Adds a **"Sun Burst"** filler item, causing 75-150 sun to instantly appear. - Adds a **"Zombie Caffeine Trap"** item, causing all zombies on the lawn to gain a speed boost. - Adds an **"RV Trap"** item, causing an RV to be thrown at your plants. - Adds a **"Crater Trap"** item, causing three random craters to appear on your lawn. - Adds a **"Lawn Flip Trap"** item, causing your plant's positions to be flipped - i.e. what was originally in the back column is now at the front, and vice versa. - Adds a **"Lawn Randomiser Trap"** item, causing each plant on the lawn to transform into completely random plants. - Adds an **"Instant Zombie Hypnosis"** filler item that instantly hypnotises all on-screen zombies when received. - Adds a "light" setting for individual tile unlocks. - Adds a plant stat randomisation blacklist option, allowing you to choose specific plants to be unaffected by plant stat randomisation. - Tweaked conveyor randomisation logic for "Mini-games: Column Like You See 'Em". - Fixed a bug where flag locations would send early in "Fog: Level 4-4". - Put further limits on how fast plants can fire with plant stat randomisation. - Cloudy Day levels that take place on the Roof now logically expect Roof Cleaners. - Improved enforcement of maximum sun capacity. - Shovels dropped by zombies prior to the final wave will no longer be oversized. - Increased the maximum length of host, slot and password inputs from 24 characters to 100. - Improved controller support for "Random Seed Packet" filler. - Made changes to how randomised zombies are selected for "Mini-games: Seeing Stars", "Bonus Levels: Art Challenge Wall-nut" and "Bonus Levels: Art Challenge Sunflower", limiting the appearance of more destructive zombies. - Spoiler log details are now labelled by slot name. - Renamed "Mass Zombie Freeze" to "Instant Zombie Freeze". - Toughness will no longer be randomised for Spikeweed and Spikerock as it had no effect. - Rate will no longer be randomised for Cob Cannon as it had no effect.
For instructions, see the [Setup Guide.](https://github.com/dannybonz/replanted_archipelago/blob/main/apworld/docs/setup.md)

entry.title: Shadow The Hedgehog v0.4.7
entry.content:
Fix release files for previous version. Disable active debugging code correctly including for client loading.
==Please note all the below are a WIP, if you wish to contribute to improve== Level Guide: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1AhW4_tbdYi1otHE17zuGV4dDjaR6xaNDB6nT8rVNY0o/edit?usp=sharing
Setup Guide: https://github.com/choatix/Archipelago/blob/shadow-cp/worlds/shadow_the_hedgehog/docs/setup_en.md
Readme: https://github.com/choatix/Archipelago/blob/shadow-cp/worlds/shadow_the_hedgehog/docs/en_Shadow%20The%20Hedgehog.md
Archipelago Wiki: https://archipelago.miraheze.org/wiki/Shadow_the_Hedgehog
_Changes since last big release (0.2.7)_ **Item Box Sanity** Capsules, boxes containing capsules are added as optional sanity.
**Checkpoint Shuffle** Random starting checkpoint for levels and unlockable checkpoints as items in game.
**Checkpoint Convenience** Option available to be able to go back to any previous activated checkpoint when playing with checkpoint sanity on.
**Improved Logic Handling** Reworked logic for all enemies, items, weapons, etc to improve seeds.
**Key Shuffle** Options related to key items and key doors allowing for more varied routes through stages.
**Last Way Early** Previous Last Way was only included in story shuffle with the option, but now available by selecting Last Story even when playing select, preventing Devil Doom.
**Select Gates** Gates added so stage accessibility is not locked to single stage unlocks.
**Traps** Small assortment of traps added - Checkpoint, Ammo and Poison.

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.7.post2
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.7
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.0.1
entry.content:
See info page: https://github.com/Alchav/Archipelago/blob/spicy-mycena-64/worlds/sm64ex_spicy/docs/en_Spicy%20Mycena%2064.md
Use this repo to build your sm64ex game executable: https://github.com/Alchav/sm64ex
This is minimally tested, please report any issues! There will probably be some :)

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.0.1
entry.content: - Music Shuffle option added. - BoB should not get swapped out for another level when Area Randomizer is off. - Castle Cannon renamed to Cannon Unlock - Castle.

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.0.3
entry.content: - Fixes logic issue with Wing Mario over the Rainbow entrance logic

entry.title: Fakutori v0.1.1.post2
entry.content:
- **Asset rebuilt 2026-06-08:** fixed generation crashes — `KeyError: 'Quasar'` in set_rules for non-Quasar goals, `Extra shop` duplication with 2+ Fakutori players, and a multiworld `FillError` (filler under-count from the shared item pool); added manifest `compatible_version` so the world reports its version (0.1.1) correctly. - Fixed EvolvingFire recipe logic - Consistent minimum ap client version
see https://github.com/chickentuna/FakutoriRandomizer/releases for plugin

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.1
entry.content:
[Setup Guide](https://github.com/theemeraldsword85/DELTARUNEAP/blob/main/worlds/deltarune/docs/setup_en.md) - [Q&A](https://github.com/theemeraldsword85/DELTARUNEAP/blob/main/worlds/deltarune/docs/en_DELTARUNE.md)
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
Here we are ! The big update ! So big that the patch note might miss some things but i'm gonna try to make it complete
**Linux is not supported for now and will disconnect you after few seconds from the server! Linux will be supported in future updates**
**Starting a chapter with previous chapter completion data isn't recommended as it was developed with that in mind and can lead to blocking bugs** # Changelog
## APWorld - Complete rewrite of the rules with the new RuleBuilder, so AP v0.6.7 is the minimum version now. (which why would you be using anything else smh...) - The Client itself doesn't connect to the game anymore, but you can still use it for text, universal tracker, and patching the game. - Universal Tracker commands are now handled - Added Unlock Characters option - Added Unlock S/R/N-Actions option - Added Progressive [Character] Weapons - Added per-chapter macguffin option - Added Extra macguffin option - Added Remove Starting Inventory option - Added Better Odds option - Chapter 1 and 2 man room 2% -> 20% - RandomizeChapter is now set to All Unlocked by default - Added Option Presets - Secret Bosses items required like Broken Keys, KeyGen and EmptyDisk have now there own randomize option
### Chapter 1 - Include the Recruit and Lost locations - Added Throw Manual again location
### Chapter 2 - Added TwistedSwd fusion location, require Weird Route and chapter 2 included - Added Lose Swatchling location requirering Wrong Warp as an option - Added an option to exclude post-chapter locations to hold important items
### Chapter 3 - Added Extra Extra Key location for board 1 - Change IncludeTRank option to ExcludeTRank option - Added Z-Rank with Z ExcludeZRank option
### Chapter 4 - Added Mike and games location as an option (Hints are sent when entering minigame room) - Also add an option to exclude platinum trophy if needed
## Game
- Archipelago Client is now in game - Option menu has been changed - Added Music and SFX volume - Added Return to Chapter Select - Added Death Link configuration - Armor storage is now 60 for all chapters - Weapons storage is now 48 for all chapters - LancerCookie sell value is now D$50 for money farming - (Most) of location have now in-game preview when obtain - Shop have now in-game preview - Item balancing is now `final_stat = initial_stat * (current_chapter / item_chapter)` - Can only downscale the stat, minimal 1 if stat isn't 0 or negative - Death Link now show you who and how send Death Link - You can now enter/exit Fullscreen in chapter select - You can customize color classification on connection screen - S.POISON is now used when obtained - When entering a chapter, the textboxes saying what items you got is gone so you don't have to wait through like 80,000 anymore - Some save points have been added or moved across the game
### Chapter 1 - The Chapter 3 version of the battle text (Tired and spare%) has been add when it happens, including Jevil - Entering the Man room now display how many attempts was required - You can now levelup like others chapters (max hp is 120/140/100, +2ATK max)
### Chapter 2 - The Chapter 3 version of the battle text (Tired and spare%) has been add when it happens - Entering the Man room now display how many attempts was required - Return to Castle Town has been moved to below the Cyber Field Warp area - After turning Berdly into a popsicle, Noelle will *gently* give you back the ThornRing into your inventory so you can craft the Twisted Sword. Thx Noelle! - Tasque manager weird route room and Werewerewire weird route room and pre-queen room now auto-save if you die so you respawn in the room instead of at the start of mansion
### Chapter 3 - Added an NPC in the Green Room that allow you to replay past boards - The same NPC also give you Ramb reward that you missed - Physical challenges room and gameshow room are now immune to Deathtlink - Dying in Green Room auto save before dying so you don't risk dying before saving
### Chapter 4 - You can now skip first sanctuary if you have Claimbclaws! (you won't get any of the checks there though, obv) - Added an NPC in third sanctuary to go to Gerson Study Arena - You can now bed skip during Weird Route (in future versions doing the cutscene at some point will be required though!)
# Known Issues: - **Linux doesn't work. Well, technically it does, but you keep disconnecting every 5 seconds so it's nearly unplayable. Oops. Stand by for Linux support to be fixed...** - THE ARCHIPELAGO PROPHECIES... MY BABIES... THEY'RE... GONE!!! (they'll be back soon dw! just not right now) - Some locations don't tell you what you got in-game (namely, pretty much everything in chapter 4)

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.2
entry.content:
Fixed gold filler not working. Fixed resource buildings for Cataph's Southern Realms. Fixed Borgio.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.10.1...v0.10.2

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.2
entry.content:
[Setup Guide](https://github.com/theemeraldsword85/DELTARUNEAP/blob/main/worlds/deltarune/docs/setup_en.md) - [Q&A](https://github.com/theemeraldsword85/DELTARUNEAP/blob/main/worlds/deltarune/docs/en_DELTARUNE.md)
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
**Linux is not supported for now and will disconnect you after few seconds from the server! Linux will be supported in future updates**
**Starting a chapter with previous chapter completion data isn't recommended for right now as the rewrite wasn't made with it in mind. This will be fixed soon!**
# Changelog ## APWorld - During All Recruits / All Routes, being able to recruit Werewire is now in logic to access Cyber Field - Kris is required to access Sanctuary 2 due to Knight Chase - During All Recruits / All Routes, being able to recruit Guei is now in logic to access Dark Sanctuary
## Game - Fix Progressive Noelle Weapons missing the rings - Fix the oneshot gameover in chapter 1 when a member of the party wasn't unlocked

entry.title: Taskipelago v0.9.2
entry.content:
Quick patch: * Fix logic issues with consumables * Enter key now connects you when entering slot data
Notably there is also now a [web client](https://barretg.github.io/Taskipelago/web-client/) with mobile support!

entry.title: The Grinch v1.5.7
entry.content: ## Changes - The Mount Crumpit room can be skipped with delight, no teleport is needed to make it take flight. - First-visit cutscene skips were removed from the scene, to prevent misplaced players where they've never been. - The multibind tutorial teleport has sailed away, only the computer room teleport remains in play. - Boulder, max key, and breath analyzer checks are gone from the floor, keeping the open tutorial room steady at its core. - Start inventory from pool now follows its own decree, use `start_inventory_from_pool` for how it should be. ## Bugfixes - `WL - Squashing all Gifts` now requires a `Hook` to proceed, so bring the right tool along if you hope to succeed.

entry.title: Path of Exile v2.1.0
entry.content:
## The built in python client is now removed. # Use the client here: https://github.com/stubobis1/Path-of-Exile-Archipelago-Client/releases/tag/2.1.0
### New Feature: Area Locations
- Removed legacy Python client (Client.py, poeClient/) — replaced by standalone Electron client - Fixed generation logic indentation causing incorrect item/location pool building - Normal item placement fixes - Area location data updates

entry.title: Gauntlet Legends v2.1.6
entry.content:
REQUIRED: Archipelago -> https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases REQUIRED: Retroarch -> https://www.retroarch.com/?page=platforms Drag and drop gl.apworld into your custom_worlds folder in your Archipelago install.
You can launch the client from ArchipelagoLauncher, just click on the Gauntlet Legends Client button.
To patch the game, you are required to have a US copy of Gauntlet Legends for the N64. Either drag the patch onto ArchipelagoLauncher.exe or Right click the patch and 'Open With...' ArchipelagoLauncher.exe The host does not need to have a copy of the game to generate.
RETROARCH IS REQUIRED IT IS THE ONLY EMULATOR THAT WILL WORK.
IN RETROARCH: You must go to Settings->User Interface and turn the Show Advanced Settings ON. Then in Settings-> Network, you must also turn ON Network Commands. Leave the port the default.
Make sure you use Mupen64-plus-next in Retroarch as your core.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jamesbrq/GauntletLegendsAP/compare/v2.1.5...v2.1.6

entry.title: The Farmer Was Replaced v0.0.6b0
entry.content:
For installation instructions, please [see the ReadMe](https://github.com/seadoggie001/TFWR-APMod?tab=readme-ov-file)
## Fixes
- Grass Sanity can now be turned off via Options - A new option "Goal" replaced the old "Easy Mode" toggle - `Gold` requires you to collect 1,000 gold from mazes - `Dinosaur Tail` requires you to get a tail with a length of 1,000 (this is almost the entire fully-expanded farm) - Notification Popups are positioned in the bottom right corner to avoid hiding behind your inventory - Trap items are handled correctly - Mazes now require Senses (`get_entity_type` is needed to find the treasure)
### Known Issues:
- Free Hay does nothing. I'm considering using it to give a bonus 5% of your current hay, or 5 whichever is more. - You may receive many other extra filler items that do absolutely nothing. I plan to adjust/remove them later.

entry.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Dungeon Dice Monsters v0.3.4
entry.content:
# v0.3.4 New Features
## Set Starting Dice You can now specify up to 15 named dice to start your run with!
## Free Duel Pool and Free Duel Opponents You can now specify how many duelists will be in your free duel pool, allowing you to limit the number of locations in free duel mode when you set shorter goals. In addition to that, you can also specify which if any duelists you'd like to guarantee will be in your free duel pool.
## Location Groups You can now use Location Group names in your yaml for options like exclude_locations or priority_locations. You can find more info about what those names are and what they cover in the new [Location Groups Info Doc](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Archipelago---YuGiOh-Dungeon-Dice-Monsters-GBA-/blob/main/worlds/yugiohddm/docs/Location%20Groups%20Info.md)
# Documentation Links
[Info About YuGiOh DDM Randomizer](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Archipelago---YuGiOh-Dungeon-Dice-Monsters-GBA-/blob/main/worlds/yugiohddm/docs/en_YuGiOh!%20Dungeon%20Dice%20Monsters.md) [Setup Guide](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Archipelago---YuGiOh-Dungeon-Dice-Monsters-GBA-/blob/main/worlds/yugiohddm/docs/setup_en.md) [Grandpa's Shop Guide](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Archipelago---YuGiOh-Dungeon-Dice-Monsters-GBA-/blob/main/worlds/yugiohddm/docs/Grandpas%20Shop%20Guide.md) [Location Groups Info](https://github.com/JustinMarshall98/Archipelago---YuGiOh-Dungeon-Dice-Monsters-GBA-/blob/main/worlds/yugiohddm/docs/Location%20Groups%20Info.md)

entry.title: Hi-Fi RUSH v0.3.1
entry.content:
See [README](https://github.com/TRPG0/HbkArchipelago/blob/main/README.md) for install instructions.
Packaged with `zDEV-UE4SS_v3.0.1-947-g06474186`, `hibiki-bootstrap-v0.2.0`
- Fixed Track 7: VLog "Food Delivery Warning" not being checked properly. - Fixed an issue where items from other players may not be received properly if found before starting a save file. - Added an autosave when the stage select menu is opened to prevent items from not saving properly in the Hideout. - Changed how VLogs are received to reduce crashing.

entry.title: Pokemon Crystal v5.4.6
entry.content:
# Changelog
Since [5.4.5](https://github.com/gerbiljames/Archipelago-Crystal/releases/tag/5.4.5)
## Changelog - Fix spheres+distance level scaling not correctly accounting for events when calculating distance.
_This release is backwards compatible with seeds generated on 5.4.0 or later._

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.3.post3
entry.content:
Added missing tech for Sigvald. Removed inaccessible buildings for Daemons Undivided. Added the under-empire for skaven. Added missing Clan Moulder tech/ritual. Fixed battlesanity bug. Fixed despoilersanity bug. Fixed Changeling sanity not working for buildings. Fixed integer underflow on trap.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.10.2...v0.10.3

entry.title: Another Crab's Treasure v0.5.0
entry.content:
This version has unstable features
New Game Plus features and content may not work properly or have unintended effects. Use at your own risk and report any problems you encounter.
The item map tracker is also unfinished. Please report any issues you encounter with it.
This update includes a lot of bug fixes and compatibility with the most recent version of ACT

entry.title: CrossCode v0.9.2
entry.content:
## Fixes to Mod
* Fixed an issue in bundling where certain files would not be found in the archive (@CodeTriangle, #75).

entry.title: Nine Sols v0.5.4
entry.content:
For installation instructions [see the README](https://github.com/Ixrec/NineSolsArchipelagoRandomizer?tab=readme-ov-file#installation).
- Made post-PonR state playable. - The randomizer mod will now remove the usual post-PonR barriers in Central Hall, CTH, Galactic Dock and TRC, as well as force FSP to stay in its normal not-trashed-by-Eigong state. This should allow you to check any and all randomizer locations after triggering PonR, while also completing the unrandomized post-PonR sidequests if you feel like it. - Fixed the Central Hall elevator showing red "Damaged Floor" buttons all the time. Turns out this was tied to the New Kunlun Control Hub entrance being in its post-PonR state where it shows a button prompt when you walk past it. This fix might only take effect on fresh saves. - `vanilla` logic: - "GoS (East): Upper Right of Room Above Yin Jifu's Tomb" now requires (AD and LG) or CL. The "or LG" was missing before. - "Yinglong Canal: Near Root Node" now allows falling down from upper Yinglong, even if you can't climb up to this chest from the root node - `medium` logic: - "AF (Depths) - Root Node" to "Shangui Arena" now allows Air Dash and T-dash - "AM - Left Exit" to "Above Left Exit" now allows bow hover and Cloud Leap instead of Grapple - "AM - Upper Right Exit" now allows using bow hover from the light spinner ledge far to its left - "CTH - Bottom of Large Shaft" to "Yanren Arena" now allows Air Dash, Cloud Leap, T-dash and *Wall Climb* (instead of Tai-Chi Kick) - "ED (Passages): Covered By Lasers" now logically allows bypassing the zipline with bow hover - "ED (Passages): Hack 2 Statues" now allows bow hover and Ledge Grab to reach the left statue, as well as Cloud Piercer S/X to break its shield - "ED (Sanctum) - Right Exit" to "Root Node" is now itemless because Swift Runner is enough for this jump - "Factory (GH) - Hammer Brothers Roof" to "Above Root Node" now allows bow hover and ledge grab - "Factory (U) - Broken Shanhai" to "Middle Right Exit" now also requires (Cloud Leap or Ledge Grab) to get onto the ledge above the broken Shanhai. Previously, `vanilla` logic had this requirement but I forgot to copy it to `medium`. - "GoS (East): Upper Right of Room Above Yin Jifu's Tomb" now requires (AD and LG) or CL. On `medium` you can get to this *region* with T-dashes, and the location was incorrectly not requiring any movement items. - "TRC: Above Sol Statue" now allows falling from "Upper Levels", T-dashing, then Air Dashing onto the platform with the chest - `ledge_storage` logic: - "AM - Left Exit" to "Above Left Exit" now allows parry hover and Cloud Leap instead of Grapple - "AM - Upper Right Exit" now allows using parry hover with CL setup from the light spinner ledge far to its left - "ED (Passages): Above Transporter" now allows parry hover into Cloud Leap to reach the rope - "ED (Passages) - Outside Tianshou Arena" can now be logically reached with CL & LG / a triple jump from below the shortcut rope - "ED (Passages): Covered By Lasers" now allows bypassing the zipline with parry hover - "ED (Passages) - Left Exit" to the Root Node now allows parry hovers - "Factory (MR) - Left Elevator" to "Walking Chest Above Green Pillar" now allows CL & LG / a triple jump - "Factory (GH) - Hammer Brothers Roof" to "Above Root Node" now allows T-dash setup into parry hover - Factory (GH)'s platform puzzle room now allows wall sliding up either wall, then Air Dash and Cloud Leap to reach either of the upper platforms without Nymph - "Factory (PA) - Root Node" to "Lower Left Fire Zone" now allows CL & LG & AD / a triple jump with an Air Dash between jumps instead of using Nymph to lower the rope - 0.5.2 claimed the FSP tree-growing chests were in logic with CL & LG / triple jumps, but due to a silly typo, they were not. Now they are for real. - GoS (West) now allows parry hovering over the Cixing Arena - The last step of Sky Tower climb now also requires nymph to unlock the door to the root node. Previously, lower logic levels had this requirement but I forgot to copy it to LS logic. - Climbing up to "TRC - Lower Sickbay" can now be done with CL & LG / a triple jump instead of SMB. - Fixed the Cortex Center flower directly giving skill points instead of just checking an AP location - Add a comment about client/mod settings like Death Link to the example yaml - Extended 0.4.5's "item re-apply checks" to Sol Seals. In other words, if Yi is somehow missing a Sol Seal that we've already received the AP item for (after loading a save file), the mod will now "re-apply" the missing Seal and display a warning. This should mitigate various unreproducible glitches, but if you find a way to consistently trigger these warnings please report it so we can fix the underlying bug.

entry.title: Nine Sols v0.5.5
entry.content:
For installation instructions [see the README](https://github.com/Ixrec/NineSolsArchipelagoRandomizer?tab=readme-ov-file#installation).
- Fix the AFE arena softlock introduced in 0.5.4.

entry.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64 v0.0.4
entry.content:
You must re-build sm64ex if you have an older version!
## New Features
- Added Purple Switches as unlockable progression items. - Added Wet-Dry World Water Level Diamonds as unlockable progression items. - Added Tick Tock Clock Spinners as unlockable progression items. - Added Mario's Hat as an optional item that can be shuffled. - Added an unlock item for Bowser in the Fire Sea.
## New Randomization Options
- All level-feature shuffles that were not originally act-specific features can now be toggled through YAML options. - Rolling Logs now shuffles the Tall, Tall Mountain Rolling Log in addition to the Lethal Lava Land Rolling Log, and can now be shuffled as either a single global item or individual level-specific items, and now includes the Rolling Log in - Purple Switches can now be shuffled as either a single global item or individual level-specific items. - Checkerboard Platforms can now be shuffled as either a single global item or individual level-specific items.
## Coin Star Changes
- Coins Star checks have been renamed from "100 Coins" to "Coins Star." - Coins Stars are now always included and can no longer be disabled. - Added YAML options to configure the Coins Star requirement for each main course individually.
## Level Changes
- Defeating Big Boo in Big Boo's Haunt no longer spawns the staircase star. - The Big Boo star has been moved to the ground floor near the staircase.
## Interface Improvements
- Redesigned the pause menu to display per-level feature unlocks and Coins Star coin requirements. - Moved the HUD coin counter to the top-right corner of the screen. - Simplified file select progress displays.
## Bug Fixes
- Fixed music shuffle.

entry.title: Monster Hunter Freedom Unite v0.0.2
entry.content:
# Bug Fixes * Actually implement quest deathlink (it was left unimplemented intentionally but I forgot to remove the option) * Fix a set of errors caused by quest randomization being disabled * Fix deathlink tracking whether or not you are walking, rather than if you carted * Fix incorrect pointers for US and EU versions of the game * Fixed *many* quests not being registered by the client
# Other Changes * Enabling Cash Only Equipment will now attempt to put the next rank's equipment in the pool if there is space (in place of standard filler items).

entry.title: Sentinels of the Multiverse v0.4.6
entry.content: Updated Artifact Comics content and combined it into a single source Several minor fixes

entry.title: Shadow The Hedgehog v0.4.8
entry.content:
Fix release files for previous version. Disable active debugging code correctly including for client loading. Fix issues with Universal Tracker.
==Please note all the below are a WIP, if you wish to contribute to improve== Level Guide: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1AhW4_tbdYi1otHE17zuGV4dDjaR6xaNDB6nT8rVNY0o/edit?usp=sharing
Setup Guide: https://github.com/choatix/Archipelago/blob/shadow-cp/worlds/shadow_the_hedgehog/docs/setup_en.md
Readme: https://github.com/choatix/Archipelago/blob/shadow-cp/worlds/shadow_the_hedgehog/docs/en_Shadow%20The%20Hedgehog.md
Archipelago Wiki: https://archipelago.miraheze.org/wiki/Shadow_the_Hedgehog
_Changes since last big release (0.2.7)_ **Item Box Sanity** Capsules, boxes containing capsules are added as optional sanity.
**Checkpoint Shuffle** Random starting checkpoint for levels and unlockable checkpoints as items in game.
**Checkpoint Convenience** Option available to be able to go back to any previous activated checkpoint when playing with checkpoint sanity on.
**Improved Logic Handling** Reworked logic for all enemies, items, weapons, etc to improve seeds.
**Key Shuffle** Options related to key items and key doors allowing for more varied routes through stages.
**Last Way Early** Previous Last Way was only included in story shuffle with the option, but now available by selecting Last Story even when playing select, preventing Devil Doom.
**Select Gates** Gates added so stage accessibility is not locked to single stage unlocks.
**Traps** Small assortment of traps added - Checkpoint, Ammo and Poison.
